## Feature: Start player selection with name input and popup

Add a feature that allows the user to select the starting player and input custom player names before the game begins.

### Requirements
- Add UI controls for player name inputs (e.g., Player X and Player O).
- Show a popup dialog at the start of each game (or after reset) to select who should start and to enter names.
- Once names are set and the starting player selected, display them clearly in the UI alongside the game board.

### Acceptance Criteria
- User can input names for both players via a popup.
- User can select which player should start from the popup.
- The selected player is set as the first to play when the game starts or after reset.
- Player names appear next to their symbols during gameplay.
- Display the current active player (e.g., 'Current Player: X' or 'Current Player: [Player Name]') clearly in the UI during gameplay.

### Additional Notes
- Consider referencing win condition logic (see Issue #2) for game flow consistency.
